strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Laurendeau-Sarvet-Stensrud 2025 JASA as an adjacent optimal-regime IV-bounds comparator, and cite Chen-Zhang as JRSSB Series B 2023 rather than only arXiv.
Include an explicit single-X, binary-outcome, q_C=q_N=1/2 LP witness showing strict endpoint improvement with and without the Z_1 memory label.
Sharpen Conjecture 2 into observable sufficient conditions for strict gain, separating coordinate informativeness of B_N from joint compatibility restrictions in J_N.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjectures 1-2 as the novelty kernel and keep Theorem 1 plus Conjecture 3 as support statements.
